name: Curtis
notes: Known him since middle school — went through high school together and now we're both at UCLA. We don't text constantly but we hang out on campus a few times a month — gym, meals, late-night walks. Solid friendship, low-maintenance, picks right back up whenever.

context.how_we_met: Met in middle school; had a few shared classes in high school (most notably AP Literature senior year); now both at UCLA.
communication_channels: in-person on campus — not constant, but recurring

memories_together: Went to a UCLA football game together
